contract: page matrix, folded pages, required CRO blocks, image-slot plan, minimum page-count rationale

artifact.planningNote: location-matrix-planner SKILL is service x location-centric and says 'skip for single-location, single-service.' The runner's restaurant rule (build-local-site.md gates; local-seo-master lines 41-49) OVERRIDES that default: restaurants use occasion/menu/search-intent page families, not service x location. This plan follows the runner rule while applying the SKILL's page-kind CRO-block map, anti-doorway quota, and fold-not-fabricate discipline. Design seam flagged (like the Phase 4 content-writer gap).

pageMatrixStrategy.model: restaurant occasion + menu-category + search-intent page families (single fixed location; NOT service x location)
pageMatrixStrategy.rationale: Single fixed location => no service x location multiplication. Depth comes from menu breadth (11 proteins + sides + desserts), local search-intent landings, an occasion taxonomy keyed to customer moments, one real neighborhood page, and differentiator/story pages. Matches the runner's restaurant page-family requirement.

foldedPages.reason: No real captured town facts for Marion (owner did not confirm draw); fabricating local facts is prohibited (KG7). Folds to a light mention on /order + home.
No real captured town facts for Hiawatha; same fold rule.
IGNORED — owner confirmed NO catering. Do not build.
Only 1 Yelp review + 17 FB recommends; too thin for a proof page; minimal social proof surfaces on home instead.

home: <=6-field lead form -> external endpoint (BLOCKED — no endpoint)
contact: lead form -> external endpoint (BLOCKED — no endpoint)

siteSingletons: sticky mobile call/text bar mounted once in layout
valueProps: does both fish and chicken right

ctaBanner.headline: Call ahead — your order's hot when you arrive.

conversionSurfaceBlockers.detail: Home + Contact require a <=6-field lead form posting to an external https endpoint. NO endpoint captured -> the cro-block-presence gate FAILS these pages at Phase 4/5. Decision for Yahya: (a) provide a Web3Forms (or similar) endpoint + business email before build, OR (b) explicitly accept an exception to drop the lead form (home/contact ship contact-by-phone/map only). I will NOT soften the gate — the plan flags it.

Dual-CTA requires tel: AND sms:. NO sms number -> degrades to call-only. The SKILL treats the text affordance as a required block on home. Decision for Yahya: accept call-only (documented exception) OR provide an sms-capable number.
Trust grid OMITTED — <6 real facts. This IS the SKILL's own omit-and-log rule; not a blocker. Brand-story facts (owner-since-2006, press, made-to-order) surface on /about + /how-we-cook instead.

imageSlotPlan.subject: Captains wordmark/emblem — nautical + fish/chicken, navy #0a3a5c + gold #f2a516
Fried fish + chicken platter, appetizing, brand-colored
Hush puppies, okra, fries, cheese curds
Kitchen/cook action (NO real owner photo — use non-identifying representational imagery, do NOT fabricate a portrait of Ray Aqel)
Counter-service restaurant exterior/interior on an arterial
imageSlotPlan.source: generate — REPRESENTATIONAL; must NOT be passed off as a real photo of the actual 1616 storefront (truthfulness constraint for Phase 6)

artifact.imageryTruthfulnessConstraint: No real photos exist. All imagery is AI-generated and must be representational — appetizing generic food shots are fine, but generated storefront/interior/owner images must NOT misrepresent the specific real premises or person. Carry this constraint to Phase 6 (higgsfield). Prefer food-forward imagery over fabricated specific-location shots.

crossLinkPlan.mesh: 4-way founder mesh adapted for restaurant: (1) occasion -> related menu items (e.g. friday-fish-fry -> catfish/perch/cod); (2) menu-category -> related occasions + intent landing; (3) dish -> intent landing (catfish -> best-catfish-cedar-rapids); (4) all -> home hub + /menu hub; (5) local (mound-view) -> home + order.
crossLinkPlan.note: Every non-business schema node references the single {domain}/#business @id (founder P0 hub-and-spoke), wired in Phase 3/4.

artifact.minimumPageCountRationale: 32 internal pages, all carrying genuine unique content: 6 core/trust/conversion + 12 menu-category (11 proteins consolidated + sides + desserts) + 5 search-intent landings + 6 occasion + 1 real neighborhood + 2 differentiator/story. Clears the runner's 25-500 depth gate WITHOUT doorway padding. Single location => no service x location multiplication; depth comes from menu breadth + occasion taxonomy + local intent per the runner's restaurant rule. Thin/absent-fact pages FOLDED (Marion, Hiawatha, calamari, crab-cakes, catering, reviews) rather than shipped thin or fabricated (KG7).

checklist.item: Occasion page family keyed to customer moment
checklist.reason: 6 occasion pages (family-dinner, friday-fish-fry, game-day-wings, quick-lunch, late-night, weekend-dinner).
Owner confirmed NO catering — folded, not built.
Single location; /neighborhoods/mound-view carries real corridor/landmark facts. Marion + Hiawatha FOLDED (no real town facts). Distance/drive-time matrix N/A.
schemaTypes assigned per page; hub-and-spoke @id wired Phase 3/4.

No owner-authoritative prices; cannot build price answer units. Flagged.
Trust grid + aggregateRating OMITTED (thin real reviews). No fabrication.
/about + /how-we-cook + owner story (since 2006) planned; editorial-policy page deferred (small single-location restaurant).
Mapped per kind; lead form (home/contact) BLOCKED by missing endpoint; dual-CTA degrades to call-only (no sms). See conversionSurfaceBlockers.
